description: Fix CLI bin files lacking executable permission after build on Linux — npx opentabs, npx opentabs-plugin, and npx create-opentabs-plugin all fail with 'Permission denied' because tsc outputs non-executable .js files and npm rebuild does not fix workspace-linked bin permissions.

userStories.title: Add chmod +x for CLI bin files in the build script
userStories.description: As a platform contributor on Linux, I want CLI bin files to be executable after npm run build so that npx opentabs, npx opentabs-plugin, and npx create-opentabs-plugin work without manual chmod.
acceptanceCriteria: After npm run build, platform/cli/dist/cli.js has executable permission (+x)
After npm run build, platform/plugin-tools/dist/cli.js has executable permission (+x)
After npm run build, platform/create-plugin/dist/index.js has executable permission (+x)
userStories.notes:
Root cause: tsc --build produces .js files with 644 permissions (matching the .ts source files, which are also 644 in git). The npm run build script in package.json already runs `npm rebuild @opentabs-dev/cli @opentabs-dev/plugin-tools` at the end, but npm rebuild does not set +x on workspace-linked bin targets on Linux.

Fix: In the root package.json `build` and `build:force` scripts, add chmod +x calls for the three CLI bin files after tsc --build completes but before or after the npm rebuild step. The three files are:
- platform/cli/dist/cli.js (bin: opentabs)
- platform/plugin-tools/dist/cli.js (bin: opentabs-plugin)
- platform/create-plugin/dist/index.js (bin: create-opentabs-plugin)

The simplest approach is to add a small inline shell command to the build script chain, e.g.: `chmod +x platform/cli/dist/cli.js platform/plugin-tools/dist/cli.js platform/create-plugin/dist/index.js`

This must be added to BOTH the `build` and `build:force` scripts in root package.json since they have independent command chains.

Do NOT remove the existing `npm rebuild` step — it may do other useful work. Just add the chmod alongside it.

Verify by checking file permissions after build: `ls -la platform/cli/dist/cli.js` should show `-rwxr-xr-x` (or at least the owner execute bit set).
